name: Juniper Networks Junos OS J-Web authentication bypass (CVE-2024-21591)
description: A critical authentication bypass vulnerability in the J-Web interface of Juniper Networks Junos OS allows an unauthenticated attacker to gain root access or create a backdoor. Affected versions include Junos OS prior to 20.4R3-S9, 21.2R3-S7, 21.3R3-S5, 21.4R3-S5, 22.1R3-S4, 22.2R3-S3, 22.3R3-S2, 22.4R2-S2, 22.4R3, 23.2R1-S1, 23.2R2, 23.4R1. Telco and microwave backhaul routers are at risk.
